title.description: Full article title (H1), no character limit but keep under 70 chars for display

meta_title.description: SEO meta title shown in SERPs, must be under 60 characters

meta_description.description: SEO meta description shown in SERPs, must be under 160 characters

slug.description: URL-safe slug using lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only

schema_type.description: Schema.org structured data type for this content

sections.description: Top-level H2 sections of the article

level.description: Heading level — always 2 for top-level sections

subsections.description: H3 subsections nested under this H2

notes.description: Writer instructions for this subsection: key points, data, examples to include

target_keywords.description: Keywords from keyword_map this section must naturally incorporate

faq.description: FAQ items derived from long-tail questions, used for FAQPage schema markup

question.description: Full question text as it would appear in FAQPage schema

answer_hint.description: Brief writer note on what the answer should cover (not the full answer)
